'''âw-l-y-j''' ('''kawalyejoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:nemmine|nemmine]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==

|-
! Root consonants
| w-l-y-j

| [[Transitive verb]]

| [[Wikt:nemmine|nemmine]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âw-l-y-j
|-

| kawalyejoko
|}
